sentences.arabic: شَهِدَ قِطَاعُ النَّقْلِ وَالْمُوَاصَلَاتِ ثَوْرَةً حَقِيقِيَّةً مَعَ ظُهُورِ الْقِطَارَاتِ فَائِقَةِ السُّرْعَةِ الَّتِي تَرْبِطُ بَيْنَ الْمُدُنِ الْكُبْرَى.
sentences.translation: Sektor transporta i komunikacija doživio je pravu revoluciju pojavom brzih vozova koji povezuju velike gradove.
sentences.translationEn: The transportation sector has witnessed a real revolution with the emergence of high-speed trains connecting major cities.

sentences.arabic: تُوَفِّرُ هَذِهِ الْقِطَارَاتُ بَدِيلًا فَعَّالًا لِلطَّيَرَانِ، خَاصَّةً فِي الرِّحَلَاتِ ذَاتِ الْمَسَافَاتِ الْمُتَوَسِّطَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi vozovi pružaju efikasnu alternativu letenju, posebno na putovanjima srednje udaljenosti.
sentences.translationEn: These trains provide an effective alternative to flying, especially for medium-distance trips.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمَيَّزُ السَّفَرُ بِالسِّكَكِ الْحَدِيدِيَّةِ بِالرَّاحَةِ وَالْهُدُوءِ، مِمَّا يَتِيحُ لِلْمُسَافِرِينَ الِاسْتِمْتَاعَ بِالْمَنَاظِرِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ الْخَلَّابَةِ.
sentences.translation: Putovanje željeznicom odlikuje se udobnošću i mirom, što putnicima omogućava uživanje u prekrasnim prirodnim pejzažima.
sentences.translationEn: Railway travel is characterized by comfort and tranquility, allowing passengers to enjoy breathtaking natural scenery.

sentences.arabic: عِلَاوَةً عَلَى ذَلِكَ، تُسَاهِمُ هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةُ فِي تَقْلِيلِ الِازْدِحَامِ الْمُرُورِيِّ وَانْبِعَاثَاتِ الْغَازَاتِ الضَّارَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Štaviše, ova tehnologija doprinosi smanjenju saobraćajnih gužvi i emisije štetnih gasova.
sentences.translationEn: Furthermore, this technology contributes to reducing traffic congestion and harmful gas emissions.

sentences.arabic: رَغْمَ أَنَّ تَكَالِيفَ إِنْشَاءِ هَذِهِ الشَّبَكَاتِ بَاهِظَةٌ، إِلَّا أَنَّ فَوَائِدَهَا الِاقْتِصَادِيَّةَ طَوِيلَةُ الْمَدَى لَا تُقَدَّرُ بِثَمَنٍ.
sentences.translation: Iako su troškovi izgradnje ovih mreža visoki, njihove dugoročne ekonomske koristi su neprocjenjive.
sentences.translationEn: Although the costs of building these networks are high, their long-term economic benefits are priceless.

sentences.arabic: لِذَا، تَتَسَابَقُ الدُّوَلُ لِتَطْوِيرِ بِنْيَتِهَا التَّحْتِيَّةِ لِتَوَاكُبَ هَذَا التَّطَوُّرَ السَّرِيعَ.
sentences.translation: Stoga se države utrkuju u razvoju svoje infrastrukture kako bi išle ukorak s ovim brzim razvojem.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, countries are racing to develop their infrastructure to keep pace with this rapid evolution.
